title: 'make shell' is broken
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

# **kind bug**

**Description**

The 'make shell' command is shown in the Integration Test Readme (https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/test/README.md) is broken and fails with:

```
STEP 43: FROM babb7658838ed5f22c7dc7afc936cde1df7e52f28264cb22788be797b1057d79
STEP 44: WORKDIR /go/src/github.com/containers/libpod
--> b48558f6617007d55a2e9e9810faaf3c3c79f0160f373e2be193831fb6cc3524
STEP 45: COMMIT libpod_dev:master
/usr/local/bin/podman run --tmpfs -e STORAGE_OPTIONS="--storage-driver=vfs" -e CGROUP_MANAGER=cgroupfs -e TESTFLAGS -e TRAVIS -it --privileged --rm -v /root/tsweeney/workspaces/podman/src/github.com/containers/libpod:/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod libpod_dev:master sh
option --tmpfs requires a value
make: *** [Makefile:168: shell] Error 125

```
It also is using golang v1.10 and probably should be bumped up to v1.11.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `make shell`


**Describe the results you received:**

See description

**Describe the results you expected:**
Happy container.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
# podman version
Version:       0.12.2-dev

Git Commit:    "b7729cf3eb504680c98ee7703b4b22f00023ce91-dirty"

OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

```
